_readme: monday/mapping.json — column titles must match your Monday board exactly (case-insensitive). Empty string = use keyword auto-detection. Fields in 'defaults' are used only when no column mapped to that field.
_teamEmails_readme: Maps Monday 'Primary' people column display names → email addresses. Used for AE attribution. Keys are matched case-insensitively; partial matches are accepted. Add one entry per team member.
_defaults_readme: Last-resort fallbacks applied only when Primary column lookup AND item creator both fail to resolve the AE.
_skipColumns_readme: Columns listed here are silently consumed — not mapped to any Lead field, not sent to the AI synthesizer. Employee headcount is intentionally excluded: the Researcher fetches current figures from Perplexity/LinkedIn during the prep run, so the Monday-maintained value (which goes stale) is not used.
